chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No. 1360 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of bail application. 1. For orders on MA No. 7341/2023/(Urgent/App) 2. For orders on office objection and reply of advocate. 3. For orders on MA o. 7342/2023 (Exp/App) 4. For hearing of bail application. ----------------- 20.06.2023. Mr. Mamoon A.K Shirwany, Advocate for Applicant. ------------ 1. Granted. 2. Deferred. 3. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 4. Through this bail application, the Applicant seeks protective bail in Enquiry No.1HQ/1995/NAB-L dated 24.05.2023 vide Call-up Notice against officers and officials of LDA NESPAK and others. Learned Counsel submits that applicant intends to approach the concerned trial Court in respect of the pending enquiry as he has serious apprehensive of his arrest by NAB authorities. He submits that matter is at investigation stage and NAB authorities can arrest the applicant without even filing Reference against him. Without touching the merits of the case, the Applicant is admitted to protective bail in the above Enquiry for a period three weeks from today subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees Fifty Thousand only) and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court. Applicant is directed to surrender before the concerned trial Court in the aforesaid period. This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of three weeks from today i.e. 11.07.2023 or when the Applicant surrenders before the concerned trial Court whichever is earlier. This Criminal Bail Application stands disposed of in the above terms.

This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of three weeks from today i.e. 11.07.2023 or when the Applicant surrenders before the concerned trial Court whichever is earlier. This Criminal Bail Application stands disposed of in the above terms. Judge Judge Rafiq.
